description: Authoritative package type registry for the Velaris Marketplace. Part of the Velaris platform — versioned with each release. To add a new type, update this file and ship in the next release.

types.label: Connector
types.description: Integration with an external API or third-party service

types.label: Integration Pack
types.description: Collection of related connectors shipped as one package

types.label: Webhook Handler
types.description: Inbound webhook receiver that routes events to cases

types.label: Case Template
types.description: Pre-built case type with stages, steps, forms, and SLA config

types.label: Workflow
types.description: BPMN 2.0 process definition for HxFusion

types.label: Escalation Tree
types.description: Pre-configured SLA escalation policy tree

types.label: Automation Rule
types.description: Business rule set (routing, conditions, decision tables)

types.label: Form Template
types.description: Reusable form definition with fields, validation, and logic

types.label: Document Template
types.description: PDF/Word document template for case output generation

types.label: Notification Template
types.description: Email, SMS, or push notification template

types.label: Report Template
types.description: Pre-built HxAnalytics report or dashboard definition

types.label: Dashboard
types.description: Custom analytics dashboard layout with widgets

types.label: Process Mining Pack
types.description: Pre-configured process mining analysis for a case type

types.label: Data Model
types.description: Case data schema definition and field structure

types.label: SLA Policy
types.description: Service level agreement policy template

types.label: Access Role
types.description: Pre-configured access group role with privilege set

types.label: Sandbox Dataset
types.description: Synthetic test data set for marketplace sandbox environments

types.label: NLP Pack
types.description: Curated HxNexus prompt templates for a domain or use case

types.label: AI Model Config
types.description: Pre-tuned AI backend configuration for a specific domain

types.label: Knowledge Base
types.description: Pre-populated HxDocs articles and glossary for a domain

types.label: Portal Theme
types.description: CSS and branding overrides for the Customer Portal

types.label: Studio Module
types.description: New Studio sidebar module (feature flag enabled on install)

types.label: Migration Script
types.description: HxMigrate-compatible import script for a legacy BPM platform

types.label: Bundle
types.description: Multi-type package combining connectors, templates, and config
